headline: Leverage Shares by Themes Unveils Nine New 2X Single-Stock ETFs Tracking Key Players in the Technology Supply Chain
summary: Leverage Shares by Themes is pleased to announce the launch of ninenew 2X single-stock leveraged ETFs, available for trading beginning June 23, 2026. Built for active traders seeking dynamic ways to engage with potentially high-growth innovators, these products are designed with the goal of helping investors amplify returns (up & down) while actively participating in the daily performance of their underlying stocks.

headline: Cadence Design Systems: The Market Is Paying Up, But The Earnings Path Still Works
summary: Buy Cadence Design Systems: agentic AI EDA, IP growth, Hexagon SDA upside, EPS to $10.07 by 2028. Click here to read more on the CDNS stock.
